message:
fix: TypeScript strictness fixes for exactOptionalPropertyTypes

- agent-detection.service.ts: Use conditional spreading for optional
  properties to satisfy exactOptionalPropertyTypes
- config.service.ts: Use .optional().transform() pattern for nested
  Zod schemas instead of .default({}) which fails type inference

Fixes build errors when exactOptionalPropertyTypes is enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
